title: Multi-edit composition
prompt: Combine these images into a single cohesive, photorealistic group photo: place all of the people together standing side by side outdoors, with consistent lighting, scale, shadows and perspective. Keep each person's face and likeness accurate.

artifacts: slight shadow mismatch under the fourth person's feet
